provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Restricted Imports (Steel Gin Traps) Order.

The importation into Tanzania of steel gin traps capable of killing or capturing any game animals is hereby prohibited except where such steel gin traps are imported under and in accordance with a written permit granted by the Game Warden.
